creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is our first ever cruise, and we’re so happy that we did it with @resortsworldcruises during the inaugural sailing of Resorts World One in Dubai!

❤️ Check in was smooth and hassle free! The service onboard is top notch as well! 
🥳 There are so many cruise activities like foam and rain party, silent disco, amazing shows, jacuzzi, pool and water slide, and so much more.
🍴We had our meals in wonderful restaurants which are already included in our cruise ticket. 
🦒 And the best thing about being on cruise is arriving to a new destination while you’re having fun onboard!

🛳️ For bookings: 
Contact ITVAR - ONE OF THE OFFICIAL TRAVEL AGENTS OF RESORTS WORLD CRUISES
